notes: TEMPORARY lexicon for Top-sweep experiment. Contains ONLY Class C with 8 clusters. First 6 clusters copied from v7 (Deepgram, Whisper, ElevenLabs x2, Cartesia, OpenAI Realtime), each with {{since_time}} placeholder for hour-granular time filtering. Two new clusters added: (7) Moshi/Kokoro/Silero open-source voice trio, (8) Resemble AI + Inworld AI commercial alternatives. Use with --lexicon-file config/genesis_lexicon_topsweep.json --since-hours N --sweep-type Top. Other classes (A, B, D, E, F, G, K) deliberately omitted from this temp lexicon.

C.name: Voice AI Stack — Latency, Reliability & UX (Top-sweep test)
queries: (Deepgram latency OR Deepgram (latency OR slow OR streaming) OR Deepgram pricing OR Deepgram (pricing OR cost OR expensive) OR Deepgram Aura OR "Aura" Deepgram (TTS OR voice) OR Deepgram (alternative OR free tier OR realtime) OR switch from Deepgram) since_time:{{since_time}} -is:retweet -is:reply -is:nullcast lang:en
